raw_source.title: Bixin Ventures is hiring for the positions of Investment Research Manager/Analyst/Intern
raw_source.body:
Responsibilities:

1.) Conduct research and analysis on projects in the Web3/Advanced tech fields (such as AI/biotech), produce project investment research reports, and participate in team IC.
2.) Conduct research and analysis on related industries/sub-sectors and produce in-depth research reports.

Requirements:
1.) Master's degree/Ph.D. (or in progress) in CS/CE/CSE/AI-related fields (such as ML/DS/NLP/CV), or other STEM fields (physics, mathematics, biology preferred).
2.) Familiarity with at least 1-2 programming languages, such as Solidity, JavaScript/C++/Python/Rust, etc.
3.) No experience in Web3 required, but a strong interest in the industry is preferred. Experience with on-chain interactions is a plus.
4.) Fluent in both Chinese and English (speaking, reading, and writing).
5.) Equal and open-minded attitude, with a serious and responsible work ethic.

What You Can Expect:
1.) You will have the chance to engage with founders of globally recognized projects and gain valuable insights into potential investment opportunities.
2.) Experience rapid growth and advancement in your understanding of the industry, deepening your knowledge base.
3.) Gain access to up-to-date industry news and expand your network with exceptional resources that contribute to your professional growth.
4.) Enhance your understanding of professional institutional VC investment concepts and the underlying logic through immersive learning and reinforcement.

Working arrangements and compensation will be discussed during the interview. If you are interested, please send your resume to lynn.wang@bixin.com, with a copy to ellaine.xu@bixin.com.
Learn more about us: https://bixinvc.com/

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]

raw_source.author: EvanGu134
